name: L
description: PFR reactor catalyst bed or tube length

name: D

name: X[H2]
description: PFR reactor conversion for each component

name: X[N2]
description: PFR reactor conversion for each component

name: X[Argon]
description: PFR reactor conversion for each component

name: X[NH3]
description: PFR reactor conversion for each component

name: Xmax
description: PFR reactor component conversion maximum value

name: eps
description: PFR catalyst void fraction (porosity), defined as the ratio of catalyst void volume to the total catalyst volume.\nEps will affect the conversion when Basis=CatalystMass, and it will affect pressure drop when DPModelType=DPErgun.

name: V
description: PFR reactor bed or sum of all tube total volume

name: Cpc
description: PFR catalyst heat capacity for thermal inertia in dynamic mode
